candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A line, but it appears to be a company-wide summary spanning multiple operating areas rather than a COGS-specific D&A row. Since selected COGS is only Raw Materials + Changes in Inventory, there is no clear COGS-attributable D&A row to add without risking misclassification/double counting.
Component of the total D&A summary, but not labelled as COGS-specific. Using it for COGS_DA would be speculative and incomplete relative to the summary/components structure.
Component of total D&A and not identified as production/COGS-related.
Separate depreciation component, but investment property is not part of COGS.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row is identified as belonging to cost of sales/cost of revenue. The visible D&A rows are either company-wide summaries or non-COGS components, so the conservative no-double-count choice is to add nothing to COGS_DA.

candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line at the same level as the selected XSGA component rows, and the earlier XSGA selection explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization. Summary row should be preferred over underlying components to avoid double counting.
Underlying component of the D&A summary. Do not use if the summary row is selected.
Underlying component of the D&A summary. Do not use if the summary row is selected.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit R&D-related D&A component, but it sits within the broader D&A breakdown and should not be selected separately when the total Depreciation/Amortization row is available.
Underlying component of total D&A and not needed separately if the summary row is selected.

variables.notes: OK. The selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows excluded depreciation/amortization, and an explicit separate operating D&A summary row is shown before financial lines. Per the summary-vs-components rule, select only the summary row and not its component breakdown rows.
